glassmorphism.card: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/10 shadow-lg

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for sections. Containers must have padding to prevent text collision.
layout.grid: Bento grid protocol for visual tension. Asymmetric for marketing areas, dense functional grid for the product catalog.

components.Navbar: Sticky header with crystal glass effect. z-50. Navigation links must be visible on desktop. Neon hover states on links.
components.HeroSection: Bold text (Outfit font). Central floating sneaker. Background uses abstract boutique vibe or dark gradient to isolate the sneaker. Use framer-motion for smooth entrance and floating animation.
components.ProductCard: Use glassmorphism. True black or dark slate base. Border thin white/10. On hover, apply neon blue/lime glowing border. Product image max-height 300px. Buy now button in accent color.

Button.primary: bg-cyan-400 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.6)] transition-all
Button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-bold hover:border-lime-400 hover:text-lime-400 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(204,255,0,0.3)]

components.CategoryFilters: Pill-shaped or clean minimal list. Active state glowing.
components.AboutUs: Dark aesthetic with typography focused on trust (7 years experience). High contrast white text on dark slate. Use 1px borders.
components.Footer: Dark theme, large typography. 'Let's Talk' massive CTA. Email and phone numbers clearly visible.

hero.description: Floating futuristic sneaker for the main hero.

backgrounds.description: Subtle background texture/image for about or hero section if needed.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-shop-button', data-testid='product-card-1', data-testid='category-filter-nike').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React and Tailwind CSS.
Use standard HTML + Tailwind for marketing sections (Hero, About Us) for asymmetric and creative layouts.
Use Shadcn UI components for functional elements (cart drawer, select filters, standard product grid).
Apply 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Make sure these fonts are imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
Strictly follow the dark mode color palette (true black/deep slate) and use glassmorphism for product cards.
Ensure 'electric blue' and 'cyber lime' are only used for hover states and subtle glows to maintain the high-end feel.
Use the provided media URLs for the hero section and product catalog.
Include an 'About Us' section mentioning '7 years experience', trusted suppliers, and premium quality, based in 'Ontario, Canada'.
Add a 'Reviews' section showcasing fulfillment proof and customer satisfaction.
Add a Contact footer with email 'osneakers9@gmail.com' and phone '+12896007311'.
Implement modern, high-speed, app-like navigation and transitions (e.g. using framer-motion).
Ensure the hero image uses the custom generated URL showing the floating sneaker with neon lighting.
